sections.title: When interacting with Drunken Dwarf's Leg hardy gout weed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's Drunken Dwarf's Leg's problem now!

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf's Leg
lines.text: What you want, human? Me got goutweed to grow here, an' got to protect other herb patch for you, an' me supposed to read big farming book My Arm gave me. Busy!

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf's Leg
lines.text: Me learn from My Arm. He smart. Me learn good, grow lots of goutweed. Me not let your herb patch get sick either.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a copy of that book, please?
